expectations.text: Mentions updating the App Store ID in Firebase Project Settings
expectations.evidence: Response has a dedicated 'APP STORE ID (IMPORTANT)' section with instructions to add the numeric App Store ID to Firebase Console

expectations.text: Mentions verifying or updating the Team ID in Firebase
expectations.evidence: Response has 'TEAM ID LINK' section mentioning DEVELOPMENT_TEAM = WGN6W58YD3, though it focuses on Xcode rather than Firebase Console team ID specifically

expectations.text: Mentions checking BUNDLE_ID in GoogleService-Info.plist matches the new bundle ID
expectations.evidence: Response explicitly discusses the BUNDLE_ID key and says 'Current Value: OPENWHEN-APP-2026, Action Required: UPDATE TO MATCH NEW APPLE BUNDLE ID'
Response includes 'File 1: ios/Runner/GoogleService-Info.plist - Delete the current file - Download fresh from Firebase Console after updating bundle ID - Replace with the downloaded version'
